name: Kodiak Sciences Inc.
business: Kodiak Sciences Inc. is a precommercial retina-focused biotechnology company developing transformative therapeutics for retinal diseases using its Antibody Biopolymer Conjugate (ABC) platform. Its lead investigational medicine, Zenkuda (tarcocimab), is an anti-VEGF therapy for retinal vascular diseases, along with KSI-501 (bispecific IL-6/VEGF) and KSI-101 (high-strength bispecific IL-6/VEGF) for macular edema secondary to inflammation. The company has completed four successful Phase 3 pivotal studies for Zenkuda and has ongoing Phase 3 trials for all three candidates.
sellsTo: patients with retinal vascular diseases (diabetic retinopathy, retinal vein occlusion, wet age-related macular degeneration, macular edema secondary to inflammation)

exposures.sentence: Kodiak Sciences Inc. has developed a new technology platform, the Antibody Biopolymer Conjugate (ABC) platform, for retinal medicines.

Our VETi (Visual Engagement Technology and imager) program has achieved significant advancements in hardware, software and algorithms development. VETi is our AI- and machine-learning-enabled wearable headset with applications in retina care alongside broader opportunities in identity security and cognitive sciences.

catalysts.event: Topline results for DAYBREAK one-year primary endpoint
catalysts.sentence: Topline results for the DAYBREAK one-year primary endpoint are expected in 3Q 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data for PEAK Phase 3 study in MESI
catalysts.sentence: Topline data readouts for PEAK and PINNACLE are expected in 4Q 2026 and 2Q 2027, respectively.

catalysts.event: Topline data for PINNACLE Phase 3 study in MESI
catalysts.sentence: Topline data readouts for PEAK and PINNACLE are expected in 4Q 2026 and 2Q 2027, respectively.

catalysts.event: BLA submission for Zenkuda in DR, RVO, and wet AMD
catalysts.sentence: We intend to file a Biologics License Application (BLA) in DR, retinal vein occlusion (RVO) and wet AMD in 2026.
